news.title: 'I do think Blow misunderstood what the game is about': Derelict Star made Jonathan Blow rage quit, but it's the most fascinating indie platformer I've played for years

news.title: Talos Principle 3 will definitely be the last one in the series, because 'so many videogames just don't end, and then you have an endless kind of cliffhanger'

news.desc: The game industry is built on long-running franchises, but Devolver says it doesn't want that for its narrative-focused puzzle game.
